seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a WxH board maximizing covered area (Frontier-CS problems 0,1; AlphaEvolve)
mutation: composite: bounded-supply (knapsack) polyomino set + awkward footprints so exact tiling is impossible; objective = maximize covered area of an HxW parcel with rotation+reflection allowed
title: Brownfield Substation: Modular Equipment Packing
strategies: regular bounding-box grid tiling of a single module type (baseline)
first-fit-decreasing greedy: at each empty tile place the largest module (over all types/8 orientations) that fits and covers it
randomized multi-restart local search: many shuffled type-priority / orientation orders, keep the best coverage
value-density / ILP-relaxation rounding under the per-type availability constraints
